blockers.blocked_by: Remaining work is no longer implementation decomposition; it is finishing residual de-template cleanup on a last set of P2Extended pages and extending route-by-route runtime evidence to all audited pages. Launcher-driven verification is working, but coverage is still incomplete.

mainline.policy: Use the strict A/B/C/D page reality standard. Audit is complete: 46 pages audited, A=0, B=11, C=17, D=18. Implementation batches liaojiang-0jp.4, .5, .6, and .7 have been accepted and closed by the main orchestrator after compile and runtime evidence. Main remaining work is under liaojiang-0jp.8: scale launcher-driven runtime verification across all routes, surface any remaining runtime/template defects, and finish the last P2Extended cleanup slice.
